---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or a new reporting capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the requested improvement.

## Why It Matters

Explain the operator problem this would solve.

## Proposed Behavior

Describe how you would like the script or report to behave.

## Target Scope

- Documentation only
- English edition
- Russian edition
- Both editions
- Reporting logic
- CI or repository tooling

## Additional Context

Add examples, screenshots, or sample output if helpful.
